title: Data Model Layout
description: Describing the positioning of the entities in the Madalier visualization.

layout.description: Array containing entities and their layout information for a data model.

items.description: Individual entity whose position is being tracked.

entity_id.description: Universal unique identifier of the entity, referring to the relevant entity_id from the data model.

x_coord.description: X coordinate of where the entity is located visually.

y_coord.description: Y coordinate of where the entity is located visually.
